description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master, pull requests, workflow dispatch, and published releases. The workflow consists of three jobs: build, docs, and lint, all running on macos-latest. The build job checks out VoodooI2C and MacKernelSDK, bootstraps CI and VoodooInput, builds VoodooI2C in debug and release modes, and generates a release description. The docs job checks out VoodooI2C and MacKernelSDK, sets up Python 3.12, installs dependencies, builds documentation, and uploads it to GitHub Pages. The lint job checks out VoodooI2C and MacKernelSDK, sets up Python 3.12, installs dependencies, and runs lint.
